s2.ptxt: Completely loosen the lock nut of the clutch switch assembly.
Adjust the clutch switch until the threaded portion makes gentle contact with the cushion. Tighten the lock nut and verify the contact of the switch threaded portion with the cushion.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL MAIN BODY ECU (COWL SIDE JUNCTION BLOCK LH)

s2.ptxt: Install the main body ECU (cowl side junction block LH) with the 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH LOWER PANEL LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air hose and connect the connector.
Engage the claw and the 9 clips.
Instal the instrument panel finish panel LH with the screw <B> and bolt <A>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH LOWER PANEL LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air hose and connect the connector.
Engage the claw and the 9 clips.

Instal the instrument panel finish panel LH with the screw or

and bolt .

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Install the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH with the cowl side trim clip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 7 claws and 3 clips, then install the front door scuff plate LH.
